caption: First player in Tappers history to reach 125 hits
flavor: First to 125 hits in team history. When the bat is on fire, ice storms are optional.
game_text: Career hit No. 125 came on Apr 29, 2026 at Bullseyes (W 25-24, Spring 2026). Glove went 4-for-5, 3 2B, 5 RBI, 3 R that night.

caption: First player in Tappers history to reach 25 doubles
flavor: First man in team history to 25 doubles — forged, not found. Somewhere in Cary there is an anvil with his name on it.
game_text: Career double No. 25 came on Jul 1, 2026 at Como (W 18-9, Summer 2026). Glove went 4-for-5, 1 2B, 1 3B, 2 RBI, 3 R that night.

caption: 3rd player in Tappers history to reach 20 doubles
flavor: Twenty two-baggers, most of them arriving in a cloud of dirt. The Glove treats second base like it owes him money.
game_text: Career double No. 20 came on Apr 29, 2026 at Bullseyes (W 25-24, Spring 2026). Glove went 4-for-5, 3 2B, 5 RBI, 3 R that night.

caption: Second player on team with 15 home runs
flavor: Fifteen bombs in a Tappers uniform. The center fielder never swings for the fences — the fences just keep getting in the way.
game_text: Career home run No. 15 came on Apr 22, 2026 vs Soft Ballz (L 7-17, Spring 2026). Glove went 2-for-3, 1 HR, 4 RBI, 2 R that night.

caption: 4th player in Tappers history to reach 150 total bases
flavor: 150 total bases, no wasted motion. PO out here under the streetlights making it look like a photoshoot — because it was.
game_text: Career total base No. 150 came on Apr 29, 2026 vs Bullseyes (L 5-15, Spring 2026). Porter went 1-for-2 that night.

caption: 5th player in Tappers history to reach 100 hits
flavor: One hundred hits, delivered on schedule. PO moves product and baserunners — warehouse hours, warehouse rules.
game_text: Career hit No. 100 came on Jul 1, 2026 at Como (W 18-9, Summer 2026). Porter went 2-for-4, 1 R that night.

caption: 5th player in Tappers history to reach 150 total bases
flavor: A hundred and fifty bases, most of them taken the hard way. Rodger doesn't stop at first and he doesn't apologize at second.
game_text: Career total base No. 150 came on Apr 29, 2026 vs Bullseyes (L 5-15, Spring 2026). Kives went 1-for-3, 1 RBI that night.

caption: 8th player in Tappers history to reach 50 runs
flavor: Fifty times around the bases, achieved with monk-like patience. Tim doesn't chase runs — he lets them come to him.
game_text: Career run scored No. 50 came on Jun 3, 2026 at No Dice (L 5-17, Spring 2026). Tim went 3-for-3, 2 2B, 2 R that night.

caption: 6th player in Tappers history to reach 50 RBIs
flavor: Fifty runs batted in — and yes, he called it. 99-cent beers on Wednesdays, priceless RBIs year-round.
game_text: Career RBI No. 50 came on May 27, 2026 at cacheouts (L 10-20, Spring 2026). Tim went 1-for-3, 1 2B, 2 RBI, 1 R that night.

caption: 7th player in Tappers history to reach 75 hits
flavor: Seventy-five knocks for the franchise's steadiest bat. We can neither confirm nor deny the involvement of higher lifeforms.
game_text: Career hit No. 75 came on Apr 29, 2026 at Bullseyes (W 25-24, Spring 2026). Corey went 2-for-4, 1 RBI, 2 R that night.

caption: 6th player in Tappers history to reach 50 runs
flavor: Fifty trips home and a mud-soaked grin to show for it. Maki scores the way he slides — fully committed.
game_text: Career run scored No. 50 came on Apr 22, 2026 at Soft Ballz (L 17-18, Spring 2026). Corey went 3-for-3, 2 R that night.

caption: 8th player in Tappers history to reach 150 plate appearances
flavor: 150 plate appearances unlocked. Level up. The catcher-turned-completionist grinds every count like a side quest.
game_text: Career plate appearance No. 150 came on Apr 29, 2026 at Bullseyes (W 25-24, Spring 2026). Jason went 3-for-4, 1 RBI, 3 R that night.

caption: 9th player in Tappers history to reach 50 runs
flavor: Fifty runs scored — Walters crosses home like it's the Kentucky Derby, and the scoreboard agrees.
game_text: Career run scored No. 50 came on Jul 1, 2026 at Como (W 18-9, Summer 2026). Jason went 1-for-4, 2 RBI, 1 R that night.

caption: 14th player in Tappers history to reach 100 plate appearances
flavor: One hundred plate appearances for the people's champ. Hot dog in one hand, cold one in the other, OBP somewhere in the cooler.
game_text: Career plate appearance No. 100 came on Jun 3, 2026 at No Dice (L 5-17, Spring 2026). Joey went 0-for-1 that night.

caption: 15th player in Tappers history to reach 25 hits
flavor: Twenty-five career hits and a carnival to celebrate every one. Walsh smiles because he knows the next one's coming.
game_text: Career hit No. 25 came on Apr 29, 2026 at Bullseyes (W 25-24, Spring 2026). Walsh went 2-for-3, 1 RBI, 1 R that night.

caption: Hit first 2 career home runs in Game 2 win versus the Bullseyes
flavor: The Rauppy Dinger finally landed — then another one, same night. Two career firsts in a one-run win, and the fireworks budget has never recovered.
game_text: Career home run No. 1 came on Apr 29, 2026 at Bullseyes (W 25-24, Spring 2026). Joel went 3-for-3, 2 HR, 7 RBI, 3 R that night.

caption: Topps Live Series
flavor: Brings a whole bag of bats because pitchers keep breaking his heart, never his swing.

caption: Topps Live Series
flavor: Full extension, every play. JJ's glove has frequent-flyer miles.

caption: Topps Live Series
flavor: The vibes-per-plate-appearance leader since the day he showed up.

caption: Topps Live Series
flavor: Jason's Catching Station: throw it here. Response time may vary during ranked matches.

caption: Prayers Up · Injured Reserve
flavor: Down but not out. Joey took a valiant cannonball into a 4-foot pool and came up with a bruised knee — officially day-to-day, with a very real chance it's season-ending. The clubhouse lights a candle. Get well soon, Snaxx.

caption: 2026 Summer · Week 1 Spotlight
flavor: Sun, sand, and a series sweep. Rodger torched Como for a 6-for-8, home-run, 6-RBI opening week and walked off with Player of the Week honors. The beach never stood a chance.

caption: 2026 Summer · Week 3 · Injury Update
flavor: Rodger chased one into the outfield fence in Game 2 and the fence won. Carted off in the first inning with a bad ankle — one at-bat, then the beach chair. Day-to-day, and the whole clubhouse is pulling for him. Get well soon, Rodger.
facts: Ankle — ran into the outfield fence

caption: 2026 Summer · Week 3 · First Career Ejection
flavor: Maki made history — just not the kind that goes in the scorebook. Game 1 ended early when the umpire spotted a bottle of Hennessy holding down the bench. First career ejection in Tappers history, and the boys have never been prouder. Still our guy.
facts: Bottle of Hennessy on the bench

caption: 1st player in Tappers history to reach 50 home runs
flavor: Fifty bombs, and the first man in franchise history to get there. The bat flip was optional. The history was not.
game_text: Career home run No. 50 came on Jul 15, 2026 at Zero to Hiro (W 16-11, Summer 2026). Tristan went 3-for-4, 2 2B, 1 HR, 1 RBI, 3 R that night.

caption: 1st player in Tappers history to reach 125 runs
flavor: 125 runs and counting — nobody in franchise history has crossed the plate more. The captain doesn't just lead the team; he leads it home.
game_text: Career run scored No. 125 came on Jul 15, 2026 at Zero to Hiro (W 16-11, Summer 2026). Tristan went 3-for-4, 2 2B, 1 HR, 1 RBI, 3 R that night.

caption: 4th player in Tappers history to reach 75 games
flavor: Seventy-five games in a Maple Tree uniform. Rain, shine, or otherwise, the captain answers the bell.
game_text: Career game No. 75 came on Jul 15, 2026 vs Zero to Hiro (W 13-12, Summer 2026). Tristan went 2-for-4, 1 2B, 2 R that night.

caption: 3rd player in Tappers history to reach 75 singles
flavor: Seventy-five singles, each one a quiet act of defiance against the box score. Maki just keeps finding grass.
game_text: Career single No. 75 came on Jul 15, 2026 vs Zero to Hiro (W 13-12, Summer 2026). Corey went 1-for-3, 1 RBI that night.

caption: 7th player in Tappers history to reach 50 RBI
flavor: Fifty runs driven in. Maki doesn't ask who's on base — he just brings them home and asks questions later.
game_text: Career RBI No. 50 came on Jul 15, 2026 vs Zero to Hiro (W 13-12, Summer 2026). Corey went 1-for-3, 1 RBI that night.

caption: 4th player in Tappers history to reach 75 RBI
flavor: Seventy-five RBI from the man who's usually diving on defense. Turns out JJ drives them in almost as often as he leaves his feet.
game_text: Career RBI No. 75 came on Jul 15, 2026 vs Zero to Hiro (W 13-12, Summer 2026). JJ went 2-for-4, 3 RBI, 1 R that night.

caption: 3rd player in Tappers history to reach 100 runs
flavor: One hundred runs scored. Get JJ on base and the scoreboard is a formality — he's cleared for takeoff.
game_text: Career run scored No. 100 came on Jul 15, 2026 vs Zero to Hiro (W 13-12, Summer 2026). JJ went 2-for-4, 3 RBI, 1 R that night.

caption: 8th player in Tappers history to reach 50 singles
flavor: Fifty career singles, unlocked. Walters grinds out base hits like achievements — one clean knock at a time.
game_text: Career single No. 50 came on Jul 15, 2026 vs Zero to Hiro (W 13-12, Summer 2026). Jason went 2-for-3, 1 RBI, 1 R that night.

caption: 7th player in Tappers history to reach 200 at-bats
flavor: Two hundred at-bats of blue-collar consistency. PO clocks in, moves the product, and clocks out.
game_text: Career at-bat No. 200 came on Jul 15, 2026 at Zero to Hiro (W 16-11, Summer 2026). Porter went 2-for-4, 1 R that night.

caption: 13th player in Tappers history to reach 100 at-bats
flavor: One hundred career at-bats for the people's champ. Everybody gets here eventually — Snaxx just did it with a snack in hand.
game_text: Career at-bat No. 100 came on Jul 15, 2026 vs Zero to Hiro (W 13-12, Summer 2026). Joey went 1-for-3, 1 R that night.

caption: 8th player in Tappers history to reach 75 hits
flavor: Seventy-five career hits, audited and confirmed. The numbers never lie, and Tim's ledger keeps growing.
game_text: Career hit No. 75 came on Jul 15, 2026 at Zero to Hiro (W 16-11, Summer 2026). Tim went 2-for-4, 1 2B, 3 RBI, 2 R that night.

caption: 2026 Summer · Week 4 · Player of the Week
flavor: Mister Raupp went 5-for-7 with a home run and five driven in to sweep Zero to Hiro and claim his first career Player of the Week. Class dismissed.

caption: 6th player in Tappers history to reach 100 hits
flavor: A hundred knocks, zero days off. Duff doesn't chase milestones — he just shows up until they surrender.
game_text: Career hit No. 100 came on Jul 22, 2026 at Bleacher Bums (L 2-12, Summer 2026). Duff went 1-for-2 that night.

caption: 8th player in Tappers history to reach 50 RBI
flavor: Fifty driven in, most while the rest of us were still finding our helmets. The duffel holds bats, gloves, and a bottomless supply of clutch.
game_text: Career RBI No. 50 came on Jul 22, 2026 vs Bleacher Bums (W 17-6, Summer 2026). Duff went 3-for-3, 1 3B, 3 RBI, 1 R that night.

caption: 7th player in Tappers history to reach 10 walks
flavor: Ten times he stared down ball four and politely declined to swing. Patience, served chilled.
game_text: Career walk No. 10 came on Jul 22, 2026 vs Bleacher Bums (W 17-6, Summer 2026). Glove went 2-for-3, 1 RBI, 3 R that night.

caption: 11th player in Tappers history to reach 50 hits
flavor: Fifty career knocks for the teacher — steady as a lesson plan. The chalkboard tally finally rounded off.
game_text: Career hit No. 50 came on Jul 22, 2026 at Bleacher Bums (L 2-12, Summer 2026). Joel went 1-for-2, 1 2B, 1 R that night.

caption: 4th player in Tappers history to reach 75 singles
flavor: Seventy-five singles, each delivered on time and to the correct address. PO doesn't do flashy — he does reliable.
game_text: Career single No. 75 came on Jul 22, 2026 vs Bleacher Bums (W 17-6, Summer 2026). Porter went 1-for-2 that night.

caption: 10th player in Tappers history to reach 10 doubles
flavor: Ten doubles and the widest grin at the fair. Walsh rings the strongman bell, then legs out two.
game_text: Career double No. 10 came on Jul 22, 2026 vs Bleacher Bums (W 17-6, Summer 2026). Walsh went 2-for-3, 1 2B, 1 R that night.

caption: 2nd player in Tappers history to reach 150 hits
flavor: One hundred and fifty knocks and still hunting. The captain treats a base hit like a formality — show up, square it up, do it again.
game_text: Career hit No. 150 came on Jul 22, 2026 vs Bleacher Bums (W 17-6, Summer 2026). Tristan went 4-for-4, 1 2B, 2 RBI, 4 R that night.

caption: 2nd player in Tappers history to reach 125 runs
flavor: A hundred and twenty-five times he has touched home. Getting on is the job; getting all the way around is the art.
game_text: Career run scored No. 125 came on Jul 22, 2026 vs Bleacher Bums (W 17-6, Summer 2026). Glove went 2-for-3, 1 RBI, 3 R that night.

caption: 5th player in Tappers history to reach 75 singles
flavor: Seventy-five singles, punched in and delivered on schedule. Duff does not hit for show — he hits for the shift.
game_text: Career single No. 75 came on Jul 22, 2026 vs Bleacher Bums (W 17-6, Summer 2026). Duff went 3-for-3, 1 3B, 3 RBI, 1 R that night.

caption: 2026 Summer · Week 5 · Franchise Record
flavor: Ten driven in on a single night — the most anyone has ever managed in a Tappers uniform. He broke a mark that had stood since Fall 2025, in his first game back, carrying a career line of 0-for-4.
facts: Most RBI in a game (prev. 8 — Glove)

caption: 2026 Summer · Week 5 · Player of the Week
flavor: A perfect week at the plate in his first week back: four swings, four hits, three of them over the fence, ten runs driven in. Nobody has ever announced a return quite like it.

caption: 2026 Summer · Week 5 · 3 home runs in a game
flavor: Three swings, three balls gone. Only Tristan, Tim and Glove had ever done it in a Tappers uniform — Harm made it four, in his first game back.
